creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #4)
> BYPASS_INSTALLCHECK_SH=yes gets installworld further, which later fails at:

Note that I added the installworld rescue test explicitly to make sure a working rescue will exist after the install in case it's needed for recovery. BYPASS_INSTALLCHECK_SH should only be used if you have some other way to recover (a ZFS boot environment, alternate boot media, etc.)
